context: Largest single source this week (AS202425, IP Volume inc, NL, malicious). RDP Crawler 3,134,643 + RDP Bruteforce 279,746. Concentrated 48-hour burst 01-02 June, then quiet.

Persistent two-node scanner pair on AS209630 (LLC VASH KREDIT BANK, NL): 85.11.167.7 (4,131,167) + 85.11.167.11 (4,057,319). >99% untagged high-volume connection scanning. Block at perimeter, pair with JA4T fingerprint hunting.
Alsycon B.V. (AS49870, NL) pair 160.119.76.51 + 160.119.76.52. Persistent high-volume scanning; this period dominated by web/TLS crawling. Block and monitor for behavioral shifts.
VPSVAULT.HOST RouterOS brute-force node (AS215925, NL). RouterOS Bruteforcer 1,006,257 on TCP/8728. Third consecutive week.
VPSVAULT.HOST RouterOS brute-force node (AS215925, BR). RouterOS Bruteforcer 525,869 on TCP/8728. Third consecutive week.

Unattributed single-port sweep (AS200730, PL). 1,323,210 sessions exclusively on TCP/1723, GreyNoise classification unknown, >99% untagged. Reported as an observable pattern only; no threat attribution asserted.
VPSVAULT.HOST LTD (AS215925) hosting the persistent RouterOS bruteforcer pair (45.198.224.18 NL, 45.205.1.5 BR).
React Server Components unsafe-deserialization RCE (CVSS 10.0, CISA KEV). Highest-volume KEV web RCE in the dataset this week. Persistent.
PHPUnit eval-stdin.php RCE (CVSS 9.8). Sustained web-scanner volume this week.
Apache HTTP Server path traversal (CVSS 9.8, CISA KEV). Sustained web-scanner volume this week.
Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS CVE-2020-2034 Crawler tag, dataset-wide volume this week (not attributed to a single source).
PHP-CGI Windows argument injection (CVSS 9.8, CISA KEV). Sustained web-scanner volume this week.
